bible.title: Oink Oink Lost: Moon Station Muddle

setting.name: Moon Station
setting.description: A cozy space station that loops around the moon like a silver hug. Wide windows show the cratered moon outside, and every room is full of soft hums, round doors, and friendly robot pings.
decorations: floating dust sparkles in low gravity
tubing and rails along the walls
soft landing pads on the floor

player.description: Piglet, a tiny baby pig in a snug space suit with a bubble helmet and sleepy rosy cheeks.
player.accessory: A small star-shaped badge on the suit

bible.narratorIntro: Piglet got a little turned around on the moon station. Three friendly neighbors have clues, and Mama Pig is waiting somewhere cozy inside the station.

buildings.name: Command Bridge
buildings.exteriorDescription: A bright silver doorway with blinking lights and a wide window looking out over the moon.
buildings.interiorDescription: A curved control room with screens, buttons, and a captain chair that swivels slowly.

buildings.name: Moon Greenhouse
buildings.exteriorDescription: A clear domed room with leafy shapes waving behind the glass and a little mist on the panels.
buildings.interiorDescription: A warm plant room with rows of tiny moon tomatoes, hanging vines, and water beads on the leaves.

buildings.name: Comet Café
buildings.exteriorDescription: A rounded hatch with a glowing cup sign and a sweet smell of toast drifting out.
buildings.interiorDescription: A cheerful snack room with sticky buns, juice pods, and a shiny counter with stools.

buildings.name: Sleep Pod Nook
buildings.exteriorDescription: A quiet hall of round blue pod doors, all softly lit like tiny moons.

buildings.name: Airlock Bay
buildings.exteriorDescription: A sturdy circular chamber with thick doors and warning stripes that glow gently.

buildings.name: Supply Locker
buildings.exteriorDescription: A boxy storage module with stacked crates and labeled bins on the wall.

npcs.name: Captain Hoot
npcs.appearance: A round white owl in a tiny captain coat with golden buttons and a neat map pinned to the wall.
npcs.personality: Calm, wise, and a little funny.

lines.greeting: Hoo-hoo! Welcome aboard, little explorer. You look like you're searching for someone.
lines.hint: I am sure Mama did not stop at Command Bridge.
lines.idle: Hoo hoo, the station hums so nicely.

smallTalkFacts: The bridge watches the whole moon station.
Buttons on the console glow blue and gold.
Captain Hoot likes neat lines on maps.
openingChoices: Tell me about the star maps.
conversation.clueLeadIn: I can point you the right way.

npcs.name: Bun-Bit
npcs.appearance: A friendly white robot rabbit with green ear lights and tiny tool paws.

lines.greeting: Boop-boop! Hello, Piglet. My scanners say you could use a friendly helper.
lines.hint: I am sure Mama did not stop at Moon Greenhouse.
lines.idle: Boop boop, plants love tidy water.

smallTalkFacts: Water floats in little shiny beads here.
Bun-Bit trims leaves with tiny tool paws.
openingChoices: Tell me about the moon tomatoes.
How do the water beads float?

npcs.name: Mira
npcs.appearance: A fluffy gray cat in a striped apron with flour on her whiskers and a spoon tucked in her pocket.
npcs.personality: Cheerful, chatty, and proud of snacks.

lines.greeting: Meow! Hello, little star. Come in—the buns are warm and I'm all ears.
lines.hint: I am sure Mama did not stop at Supply Locker.
lines.idle: Meow, the buns are puffing up nicely.

smallTalkFacts: The café has sticky buns and juice pods.
The counter shines like a little rocket wing.
Mira likes to stack cookies in neat circles.
openingChoices: Tell me about the sticky buns.

hints.text: I am sure Mama did not stop at Command Bridge.
I am sure Mama did not stop at Moon Greenhouse.
I am sure Mama did not stop at Supply Locker.

candidateLocations.name: Command Bridge
candidateLocations.description: A glowing control room with big moon views, buttons, and a captain chair.

clueFacts.attribute: Mama went somewhere that smells like cool metal.
clueFacts.direction: Mama went somewhere on the west side of the station.
clueFacts.object: Mama went somewhere with a map wall.

candidateLocations.name: Moon Greenhouse
candidateLocations.description: A warm dome full of tiny plants, mist, and floating water beads.

clueFacts.attribute: Mama went somewhere that smells like warm bread.
clueFacts.direction: Mama went somewhere on the north side of the station.
clueFacts.object: Mama went somewhere with a leafy plant rack.

candidateLocations.name: Comet Café
candidateLocations.description: A cozy snack room with buns, juice pods, and a shiny counter.

clueFacts.attribute: Mama went somewhere that smells like warm bread.
clueFacts.direction: Mama went somewhere on the east side of the station.
clueFacts.object: Mama went somewhere with a shiny snack counter.

candidateLocations.name: Supply Locker
candidateLocations.description: A tidy locker room with crates, bins, and labeled supplies.

clueFacts.attribute: Mama went somewhere that smells like cool metal.
clueFacts.direction: Mama went somewhere on the south side of the station.
clueFacts.object: Mama went somewhere with a crate stack.

bible.reunionLine: Mama Pig is here! She wraps Piglet in a gentle hug and says, 'There you are, my little star.'
bible.verification: Each clue rules out one wrong place; only Comet Café remains.

visualDirection.architecture: A circular moon station concourse with connected rooms around one central hallway, round hatch doors, thick portholes, and curved metal walls.
visualDirection.lighting: Gentle glowing panels, soft amber café light, and cool moonlight spilling through windows.
visualDirection.atmosphere: Cozy, quiet, and mildly mysterious in a friendly way, like a bedtime adventure in space.
visualDirection.walkableSurface: Smooth metal floors with rubbery floor strips and soft round mats at doorways.
visualDirection.imageStyle: Child-friendly storybook illustration with clean shapes, soft edges, and clear room-to-room layout.

suggestedReplies.text: Tell me about the sticky buns.

suggestedReplies.text: Tell me about the star maps.
